title: Mind is blown
author: LaysWellWithOthers

replies.author: LaysWellWithOthers
replies.body: This is my personal edge, you are not going to find it online.

comments.author: Vast_Distribution591
comments.body: I love these flex posts that offer no explanation whatsoever, really helpful and interesting stuff. Thanks for contributing.

replies.author: LaysWellWithOthers
replies.body:
AlphaBot is a Python asyncio equities bot on live IBKR data, running a Ross Cameron style momentum strategy: low-float gappers, news catalysts, etc.

The design rule: the deterministic core handles signals and execution. The LLM only does the judgment-heavy stuff where a wrong answer costs a missed trade: catalyst classification, watchlist curation, post-trade journaling, risk governance.

Stack: LangGraph (replay + interrupts), Pydantic-typed tools (rejects malformed tool calls before the broker sees them), MCP transport, Qwen3.6 local via vLLM for  inference.

comments.author: Khalitz
comments.body: Says his mind is blown, declines to elaborate further, never heard from again.
